channel.title: GitHub Mustache Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Mustache in GitHub

item.title: argoproj/argo-helm
item.description: ArgoProj Helm Charts

item.title: sentry-kubernetes/charts
item.description: Easily deploy Sentry on your Kubernetes Cluster

item.title: amzn/selling-partner-api-models
item.description: This repository contains OpenAPI models for developers to use when developing software to call Selling Partner APIs.

item.title: kubecost/cost-analyzer-helm-chart
item.description: Kubecost helm chart

item.title: prometheus-community/helm-charts
item.description: Prometheus community Helm charts

item.title: erictummers/rancher-desktop-playground
item.description: installation and sample use of rancher desktop

item.title: swagger-api/swagger-codegen
item.description: swagger-codegen contains a template-driven engine to generate documentation, API clients and server stubs in different languages by parsing your OpenAPI / Swagger definition.

item.title: jenkinsci/helm-charts
item.description: Jenkins helm charts

item.title: VictoriaMetrics/helm-charts
item.description: Helm charts for VictoriaMetrics, VictoriaLogs and ecosystem

item.title: fluent/helm-charts
item.description: Helm Charts for Fluentd and Fluent Bit

item.title: confluentinc/cp-helm-charts
item.description: The Confluent Platform Helm charts enable you to deploy Confluent Platform services on Kubernetes for development, test, and proof of concept environments.

item.title: Kong/charts
item.description: Helm chart for Kong

item.title: aws/eks-charts
item.description: Amazon EKS Helm chart repository

item.title: thmsgbrt/thmsgbrt
item.description: My awesome README.md

item.title: Backbase/backbase-openapi-tools
item.description: Backbase Open Api Tools (boat) helps manage large OpenAPI projects

item.title: codecentric/helm-charts
item.description: A curated set of Helm charts brought to you by codecentric

item.title: opensearch-project/helm-charts
item.description: ☸️ A community repository for Helm Charts of OpenSearch Project.

item.title: rudderlabs/rudderstack-helm
item.description: Open-source, warehouse-first Customer Data Pipeline and Segment-alternative. Collects and routes clickstream data and builds your customer data lake on your data warehouse.
